Eyes narrowed to predatory slits, lips parted just enough to reveal the edge of teeth in a hunter's smile.
Jaw clenched tight, brow furrowed in cold focus, unblinking stare that calculates exactly where to strike next.
Lip curled in contemptuous sneer, one brow arched high, eyes half-lidded with bored disdain for lesser threats.
Mouth open mid-snarl, teeth fully bared, eyes wild with battle fury, every muscle in the face pulled taut.
Blood trailing from split lip, eyes still sharp and unwavering, jaw set with unbroken defiance despite the wound.
Face utterly still, eyes scanning with glacial calm, no emotion except the promise of efficient violence to come.
Slight smile playing at the corners of the mouth, eyes cold and mirthless, amusement at another's predictable failure.
Head tilted slightly back, eyes looking down along the bridge of the nose, expression radiating absolute lethal superiority.
Eyes half-closed in ritual focus, lips moving silently through whispered incantations, brow smooth with dangerous concentration.
Tongue briefly touching one canine tooth, eyes narrow and hungry, mouth curved in anticipation of imminent prey.
Nostrils flared wide, eyes locked forward with unblinking intensity, mouth a thin compressed line promising merciless retribution.
Eyebrows drawn sharply together, gaze burning with focused malice, jaw shifted slightly askew in barely restrained aggression.
Lower lip caught briefly between teeth, eyes gleaming with cruel calculation, studying weakness like a butcher evaluating meat.
Face split in feral grin, cheeks pulled high and tight, eyes crinkled but utterly devoid of warmth or mercy.
One eye narrowed more than the other, mouth twisted in asymmetric smirk, expression radiating dangerous unpredictability and cunning.
Chin lifted in open challenge, eyes blazing with fierce pride, mouth parted in silent dare for anyone to approach.
Eyelids heavy with dismissive boredom, mouth slack and unimpressed, the face of someone who has killed without effort before.
Teeth gritted together hard enough to show tension in jaw, eyes rolled slightly upward in exasperated contempt for incompetence.
Mouth hanging open mid-laugh, eyes wide with manic delight, face alive with the terrible joy of imminent bloodshed.
Brow completely smooth and serene, eyes reflecting nothing but empty cold, mouth relaxed in the calm of absolute lethality.
Lips peeled back in slow, deliberate snarl, eyes locked unblinking on target, brow lowered in predatory certainty of victory.
Mouth curved in razor-thin smile, one eyebrow raised in mocking question, gaze dissecting every futile defense with surgical precision.
Eyes widened just slightly in false surprise, corners of mouth twitching upward, face radiating condescending amusement at resistance.
Jaw thrust forward in raw defiance, nostrils flaring with each breath, eyes blazing with unquenchable fury and absolute refusal.
Face frozen in eerie stillness, pupils dilated to black voids, lips barely parted in whispered promise of exquisite destruction.
Teeth clicking together in anticipation, eyes tracking movement like a serpent, tongue darting across lips tasting fear in air.
Brow lifted in theatrical mock-concern, mouth pursed in false sympathy, eyes flat and dead as a shark circling wounded prey.
Scar tissue pulling mouth into permanent half-smirk, eyes burning with ancient hatred, every line etched with surviving the unsurvivable.
Cheeks hollowed in sharp inhale, eyes rolling back briefly in ecstatic violence, mouth open in soundless roar of pure aggression.
Face tilted at predatory angle, one corner of mouth hooked upward, gaze sliding sideways with lazy, lethal assessment of worth.
Eyes widened in manic focus, mouth stretched in rictus grin showing too many teeth, face trembling with barely leashed violence.
Brow furrowed in disdainful confusion, lips twisted sideways in contempt, eyes half-shut as if opponent isn't worth full attention.
Jaw hanging slack in mock surprise, eyes gleaming with dark humor, eyebrows raised as if delighted by victim's pathetic struggle.
Mouth pressed into bloodless line, eyes burning beneath lowered lids, face rigid with the stillness preceding swift execution.
Lips curled back from teeth in silent hiss, eyes narrowed to venomous slits, nostrils flared with predatory excitement.
Face softened in almost-gentle expression, small smile touching lips, eyes betraying absolute zero compassion beneath the false warmth.
Chin tucked low, eyes staring upward through lashes with feral intensity, mouth slightly open revealing tongue pressed against teeth.
Eyebrows arched in amused disbelief, mouth pulled into crooked grin, face radiating entertained scorn at opponent's inevitable failure.
Eyes rolled back showing whites, jaw clenched mid-incantation, veins standing out at temples with ritual focus and channeled fury.
Mouth twisted into sneer of disgust, one eye squinted shut, face broadcasting utter revulsion at target's continued breathing.
Eyes fixed in thousand-yard stare of someone who stopped counting bodies long ago, mouth relaxed in disturbing tranquil indifference.
Lips drawn back slowly from clenched teeth, eyes bright with fever-intensity, brow glistening with exertion yet expression utterly controlled.
Mouth curved downward in frown of deep disappointment, eyes cold with surgical detachment, already deciding where the killing blow lands.
Face perfectly symmetrical in its cruelty, slight upturn at both mouth corners, eyes reflecting light like polished blade edges.
Jaw working side to side grinding tension, eyes tracking with mechanical precision, brow twitching as violence calculations run beneath.
Lips pursed as if tasting something bitter, eyes distant and unfocused on horrors only this warrior sees, beautiful and broken.
Nostrils pinched narrow in refined distaste, mouth a dismissive curl, eyes sweeping across scene like reaper measuring the harvest.
Lower jaw thrust out showing bottom teeth, eyes squeezed almost shut in aggressive pleasure, face radiating savage anticipatory glee.
Eyebrows raised in genuine curious interest about how much pain can be endured, mouth soft and thoughtful, gaze clinically detached.
Face caught mid-transition between expressions, eyes wild and confused between rage and ecstasy, mouth frozen halfway between scream and laugh.
